---
title: "Final Project"
author: "LDYu"
output: html_document
---

# Data

This project uses built-in R dataset (ToothGrowth) and simulated biological data.

# Results

## Table

```{r}
read.csv("../output/odds_ratios.csv")
```

Figure
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../output/hist_biomarker.png")
```
